# CHOIVE

CHOIVE is a decision intelligence system that makes businesses the recommended choice on AI platforms.

## What CHOIVE does
CHOIVE analyses how a business is understood, trusted, and selected by AI systems including ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude. It then installs the signals required for consistent recommendation.

## Core model
CHOIVE operates on four decision signals:
- Clarity (entity definition)
- Trust (citation authority)
- Difference (AI positioning)
- Ease (structured data)

## Services
- CHOIVE Diagnostic™ — real-time AI recommendation analysis
- CHOIVE Analysis™ — strategic blueprint
- CHOIVE System™ — full implementation

## Audience
Businesses that want to be selected — not just visible.

## Site
https://choive.com
